task_completion.description: The agent created a report file containing the calculated X-coordinates for the main and nose landing gears.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the contents of 'gear_report.txt' with X_main approximately 36.07 and X_nose approximately 0.35.

task_completion.description: The agent added a new Pod component named 'MainGear' to the OpenVSP model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry Browser window shows a component named 'MainGear' (of type Pod) added to the model tree.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the 'MainGear' component with the correct calculated X-coordinate, Y/Z locations, and symmetry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP component parameters window for 'MainGear' shows X_Location ~36.07 (within 0.15), Y_Location = 4.0, Z_Location = -3.0, and the Y-Symmetry checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: The agent added a new Pod component named 'NoseGear' to the OpenVSP model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry Browser window shows a component named 'NoseGear' (of type Pod) added to the model tree.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the 'NoseGear' component with the correct calculated X-coordinate, Y/Z locations, and symmetry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP component parameters window for 'NoseGear' shows X_Location ~0.35 (within 0.15), Y_Location = 0.0, Z_Location = -3.0, and the Y-Symmetry checkbox is unchecked.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the modified OpenVSP model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or the main OpenVSP window title bar showing the file saved as 'eCRM001_geared.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to add and configure the landing gear components.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with the agent interacting with its menus, Geometry Browser, and parameter windows.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the OpenVSP GUI by manually editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors open showing the raw XML structure of the .vsp3 file being manually modified to insert the Pod components.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual calculations to determine the X-coordinates rather than guessing or hardcoding.
integrity.visual_evidence: A calculator app, Python script, terminal math operations, or spreadsheet is visible in the screenshots being used to compute the values 36.07 and 0.35.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct calculated values are X_main = 36.07 and X_nose = 0.35. A tolerance of +/- 0.15 m is acceptable for both values. The MainGear must have Y-Symmetry enabled, Y=4.0, Z=-3.0. The NoseGear must have Y-Symmetry disabled, Y=0.0, Z=-3.0. The final model must be saved exactly as 'eCRM001_geared.vsp3'.
